title: Artifact Type Map
description: Schema cho mapping file extension → artifact type. Hỗ trợ custom reviewers qua extension point.

type_map.description: Mapping từ file extension (không bao gồm dấu chấm) sang artifact type string

fallback.description: Default type khi extension không có trong type_map

custom_reviewers.description: Extension point — custom reviewers cho new artifact types

extensions.description: File extensions for this custom type

handler.description: Path or identifier for the custom review handler
